Demo brief
How it works1 · Primary2 · Secondary3 · University4 · IndustryAbout
4

Level 4

Industry

Roadmap — conversations in progress

A talent-pipeline interface connecting the "AI ambassadors" coming out of Level 2 with the tech/telco ecosystem already engaged in early-stage conversations about the project. No partnership agreements are in place — this page is a roadmap, not a commitment.

Concept

From "AI ambassador" to talent pipeline

Liceo students who go through the Teenager Circle build a documented track record — facilitation, AI-output review, evaluation design. Level 4 would make that track record visible to industry partners exploring early talent engagement.

Status — honestly stated

Conversations with players in the tech/telco ecosystem are at the professional-dialogue stage — no formal partnerships, no commitments, no named logos on this prototype. This level exists to show the architecture is extensible, not to announce a deal.

School onboarding (preview)

Bring Palestra AI to your school

A preview of the registration flow for schools that want to join the programme — this mirrors the "Porta il progetto nella tua scuola" call-to-action already on palestra.ai. This form does not submit anywhere yet — it is a design mockup for the school-onboarding app.

Non-functional mockup

AI Palestra.AI Platform

Educational architecture for human–AI co-formation. Jointly developed with the schools and partners of the Palestra AI pilot.

Confidential prototype — not indexed. Demo build for internal review, June 2026.
